exceptions.title: No purchase order for matching
exceptions.description: Invoice has no associated PO and policy requires PO matching

exceptions.title: Missing vendor tax/VAT ID
exceptions.description: Vendor tax ID is required but not present on invoice
exceptions.recommendation: Request vendor tax ID before processing

exceptions.title: Suspiciously round amount
exceptions.description: Invoice amount 7500.0 is a round number – may warrant review

exceptions.title: High-value invoice without PO
exceptions.description: Invoice for $7,500.00 has no PO reference – above auto-approve threshold of $5,000.00
exceptions.recommendation: Require PO or manager approval for high-value non-PO invoices

follow_up_actions: Request vendor tax ID before processing
Require PO or manager approval for high-value non-PO invoices
